falsification_conditions.condition: The price of the asset rises above the 200-day moving average by 5% within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the HOLD signal, indicating a strong trend contrary to the bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score increases to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score exceeding 60 would indicate extreme volatility or a top formation, contradicting the bottom pattern and invalidating the HOLD.

falsification_conditions.condition: The VIX index rises above 30 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A surge in volatility (VIX > 30) would signal market panic or a sharp downturn, disproving the HOLD and suggesting a bearish move.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
